assertions.title: Only persisted signed-in sessions can produce a public share link

steps.action: Navigate to /#/brainstorm and continue as guest
steps.observed: Guest workspace rendered with Connect, Artifact, Image, Video, and message input buttons — no Share button visible in the Conversation panel header

steps.action: Reload, sign up as testvalidator+share001@gmail.com, create new session from library
steps.observed: Signed-in workspace shows 'Share session' button in the Conversation panel header alongside message count

assertions.title: Anyone with the link can open a read-only share page without auth

steps.action: Clear all IndexedDB (firebaseLocalStorageDb, firebase-heartbeat-database) to simulate fully signed-out state

steps.expected: Public share page loads without requiring sign-in
steps.observed: Share page loaded successfully showing session title, conversation, and artifacts. No auth prompt or redirect.

steps.action: Inspect page snapshot for composer, mic controls, Connect button, tool/model toggles, library controls
steps.observed: Page contains only: header (Voidpilot link, session title, SHARED badge), Conversation panel (messages), Artifacts panel (artifact cards with download). No textbox/input, no Connect button, no Artifact/Image/Video tool buttons, no model toggles, no library controls.

steps.action: Check network requests for websocket connections
steps.expected: No websocket or audio session started
steps.observed: Only GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/share/{token} requests (200). Zero websocket connections.
'Share Unavailable' page with message 'This brainstorm share link is no longer valid. The session may have been deleted by its owner.' and 'Back to Voidpilot' link.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (on valid share page); expected 404 errors on invalid token page
evidence.network: GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/share/7ad9ecfac9424f0594f22220b72c128e -> 200 (no auth header); GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/share/test-invalid-token -> 404; no websocket connections on share pages

assertions.title: Public share pages show transcript plus artifacts and allow artifact downloads

steps.action: Create brainstorm session with text message 'Create a short markdown artifact about testing best practices', receive Gemini response with artifact
steps.observed: Session contains 2 user-visible messages (user text + Gemini tool result with markdown artifact) and 1 artifact (testing_best_practices.md, 1.2 KB)
Share page shows: title 'Create a short markdown artifact about testing best…', 2 MESSAGES with full conversation text, Artifacts panel with 1 FILE (testing_best_practices.md) and download button

steps.action: Click artifact card to view preview
steps.expected: Artifact preview with rendered markdown content
steps.observed: Preview panel opens with 'PREVIEW' label, filename, close button, and fully rendered markdown content including headings (Testing Best Practices, Key Principles), bullet points, and formatted text

steps.action: Click download button on artifact card
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/share/{token}/artifacts/{aid}/download -> 200. Download triggered via blob URL.

assertions.title: The public share page feels intentionally designed, not like a fallback dump

steps.action: Inspect loading state of share page (intercepted fetch with 10s delay)
steps.expected: Polished loading state with brainstorm-aligned design
steps.observed: Loading state shows: dark background (#0a0a0a), animated particle effects, dot pattern, rounded brainstorm icon with amber pulsing animation, 'Loading shared brainstorm…' heading with 'Fetching the latest session data' subtitle. Intentionally designed, not a generic spinner.

steps.action: Inspect error/unavailable state with invalid token
steps.observed: Error state shows: dark background with particles and dot pattern, rose-colored alert icon in rounded container with shadow, 'Share Unavailable' heading, contextual error message, 'Back to Voidpilot' navigation button. Branded and intentional, not a raw error or blank page.

steps.action: Inspect loaded share page with content
steps.observed: Full layout shows: glass-surface header with amber brainstorm icon, truncated title, 'SHARED' badge with amber styling, separated Conversation and Artifacts panels with rounded corners (2rem radius), dark backdrop blur, stone/amber color scheme, proper message bubbles with role labels, artifact cards with hover effects and download buttons, artifact preview with ShineBorder animation. Consistent with brainstorm workspace design language.

assertions.title: Session titles and saved state stay consistent across owner and public surfaces

steps.action: Check owner library for session title
steps.observed: Library shows session entry with title 'Create a short markdown artifact about testing best…' dated Mar 13, 3:50 AM

steps.expected: Same title and content in workspace
steps.observed: Workspace shows title 'Create a short markdown artifact about testing best…' in conversation header, 2 messages (user text + Gemini tool result), and artifact (testing_best_practices.md, 1.2 KB) — all matching library entry

steps.action: Check public share page for same session
steps.expected: Same title and content on share page
steps.observed: Share page heading shows 'Create a short markdown artifact about testing best…', 2 MESSAGES with identical conversation text, Artifacts panel with same testing_best_practices.md file — title and content match owner library and workspace exactly

frictions.description: Hash-based routing means changing the hash fragment within the same browser page does not trigger a full page reload, so React Router may reuse stale component state when navigating between different share tokens. A full page reload was needed to properly load a new share token after previously viewing a different token on the same tab.
frictions.resolution: Used page reload after hash change to ensure fresh component mount and data fetch

frictions.description: Clearing IndexedDB to simulate signed-out state also clears auth on other tabs sharing the same browser profile, requiring re-authentication on the brainstorm tab
frictions.resolution: Re-signed in with the same test account after clearing IndexedDB

frictions.description: The share page API call is duplicated (two identical GET requests to the same share endpoint on each page load). This appears to be a React StrictMode double-render effect in development mode, not a production issue.
frictions.resolution: Confirmed this is expected React StrictMode behavior; both requests return 200

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-SHARE-001 confirmed share button only appears for persisted signed-in sessions (absent for guests). VAL-SHARE-002 confirmed public share pages load without auth, are read-only with no interactive controls, and don't start websockets. VAL-SHARE-003 confirmed transcript, artifacts, preview, and downloads all work on share pages. VAL-SHARE-006 confirmed polished design with intentional loading, error, and content states. VAL-CROSS-003 confirmed session title and content are consistent across owner library, reopened workspace, and public share page.
